name: Hardika Narula

Supervised learning, unsupervised learning, deep learning, NLP, human-in-the-loop (HITL) ML, AI sentiment analysis, churn prediction modeling, AI ethics, bias mitigation, model tuning
Python, R, SQL, Apache Spark, Hadoop, NoSQL, BigQuery, Redshift, distributed systems, low-latency systems
Enterprise SaaS, Fintech (Payments, Billing, Lending, Risk), Healthcare (FHIR R4/R4B, HL7, CDS Hooks, EHR), Telecom (eSIM/eUICC, HLR/HSS), GEOINT, Retail & Marketplace

Jira, Confluence, Slack, Microsoft Teams, Zoom, Google Meet, Figma, Miro
Leadership, Problem-Solving, Strategic Thinking, Time Management, Cross-functional Communication, Stakeholder Engagement

experience.title: Senior Technical Product Manager, Gen AI
base_bullets: Spearheaded the development of an edge AI-powered image generation and editing app, collaborating with UX, science, framework, and engineering teams from ideation to launch, ensuring cross-team alignment and timely delivery.
Led product enhancements by partnering with the science team to reduce on-device generation latency by 65%, significantly improving customer experience benchmarks and customer satisfaction metrics.

Drove product prioritization and roadmap decisions with senior leadership to ensure scalable, cost-efficient, and private image generation through on-device LLM integration, reducing operational costs by 25%.
Laid the groundwork for industry-leading, on-device creative capabilities by advancing the organization's edge AI portfolio differentiation, solidifying Amazon’s position in the AI creative market.
Developed comprehensive product documentation and feature specifications, driving clarity and alignment across teams while ensuring high-quality output and compliance with internal standards.
Managed stakeholder communications, effectively articulating the impact of product changes and securing executive buy-in for critical initiatives in the AI-powered creative suite.
Implemented rigorous performance tracking and customer feedback loops, using data-driven insights to iterate and improve product offerings.
Delivered on ambitious KPIs, resulting in a 40% increase in user engagement and a 30% increase in retention for the product within six months post-launch.
Created and managed product go-to-market strategies, collaborating with sales and marketing teams to ensure successful product launches and clear messaging to key stakeholders.
Played a key role in developing product training programs and documentation, enabling smooth onboarding and knowledge transfer to customer support teams.
Fostered a culture of continuous improvement by advocating for Agile methodologies, resulting in a 15% improvement in sprint velocity and better team morale.
Co-led the annual review of AI portfolio capabilities, identifying new market trends and ensuring that the product roadmap aligned with long-term strategic goals.
Built and scaled enterprise SaaS product capabilities, aligning product architecture and roadmap with multi-tenant customer needs and long-term platform strategy.
Applied experimentation and A/B testing frameworks to improve funnel performance, activation, and retention across key user journeys.
Partnered with engineering on scalable systems and performance optimization, leveraging distributed processing concepts to support low-latency AI workloads.
Leveraged data-driven insights and large-scale analytics pipelines to inform prioritization and continuously improve product performance.
Contributed to API-driven product design and integration workflows, enabling extensibility across internal and external systems.
Delivered integrations with enterprise collaboration tools (e.g., Slack, Microsoft Teams) to improve usability and workflow efficiency.
Built AI-assisted features and automation workflows, improving user productivity and product value.
Fostered strong psychological safety and team culture, enabling effective cross-functional collaboration and innovation.
Collaborated across UX, applied science, ML infrastructure, and engineering organizations to deliver end-to-end GenAI product experiences.
Contributed to long-term edge AI strategy and product differentiation, positioning the organization for industry-leading on-device AI capabilities.
Enabled privacy-first AI architecture through on-device LLM deployment, improving trust and compliance for enterprise users.

Leveraged big data technologies such as Apache Spark and distributed computing frameworks to process high-volume datasets efficiently and improve scalability
Led a cross-functional organization across Product, Design, QA, and Product Marketing, driving alignment from ideation through GTM.
Owned company-wide product vision and strategic execution in partnership with executive leadership.
Delivered multi-million dollar customer impact through AI-driven churn reduction and predictive analytics systems.

Facilitated the transition to a more collaborative, cross-functional approach to product development, improving team engagement and productivity by 15%.

Recognized by leadership for exceptional contributions to AI product development and customer impact.

experience.title: Senior Consultant
base_bullets: Consulted with a mid-size food cooperative on growing their sales, bettering price image, and increasing their reach in the community.

Created an elaborate Business Plan for the client and gave a final presentation which led to the next implementation stage of the go-to-market strategy.

Conducted intensive market research on competitors to determine effective market penetration techniques.

Handled 150 deliverables and 5 modules over 1.6 years for end-to-end BI implementation.

Oversaw and monitored daily efforts locally and then held touch point meetings in sync to provide project reports to the client team, gather business requirements, define project scope and technical deliverables.

Coordinated multiple phases of 15 different projects from design to release; exceeded client Service Level Agreement with 100% on-time delivery and received Accenture Spot Award.
